'''Aricos Dreleene''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Toblain sector/Legends|Toblain sector]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Aricos Dreleene was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Toblain sector/Legends|Toblain sector]] and a man of great riches. Wanting to obtain a true [[Surronian (species)|Surronian]] [[L19a freighter]] to exhibit it in conferences of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Dreelene instead bought a less-expensive, less-exclusive [[Surronian L19 heavy freighter/Legends|L19]], the ''[[Almost Authentic|First Edition]]'' under the incorrect assumption that it was a L19a. He then discovered that he had bought a mass-production ship, but he had no time to find a really-luxury one. Instead, he spent 220,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in [[Outlaw tech/Legends|outlaw techs]] and [[Slicer/Legends|slicers]] to fake the ID's of the ''First Edition.'' He managed to outwit Imperial dignitaries and pretend that he had to buy a heavy freighter as nothing smaller could transport his big collections.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

While on his ship and in deep space, Dreleene was ambushed along the [[Warchigade trade route]] by [[Privateer/Legends|privateers]] who believed he was flying a true L19a. The pirates, who were affiliated to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], captured both Dreleene and the ship. Dreleene whined in protest that the ship was a fake—his confession was filmed and uploaded to [[Cynabar's InfoNet]] by the Alliance in less than a week. After this, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] then disowned Dreleene and revoked his Moffship in a month, choosing instead to let him wallow in a Rebel prison camp.<ref name="Stock Ships" />

==Personality and traits==
Dreleene was narcissistic and had more interest in showing off his personal wealth than in doing his job. He claimed to have a big collection of fine furniture and animal trophies.<ref name="Stock Ships" />
